articles.author: Fred Imbert
articles.title: Stock futures rise along with oil prices as traders weigh U.S. attacks on Iran over the weekend: Live updates - CNBC
articles.description: Wall Street is coming off a mixed week, characterized by a rotation out of tech and into other parts of the stock market.
articles.content:
Stock futures were slightly higher on Sunday, as tensions between Iran and the U.S. escalated once again following renewed attacks in the Middle East which threaten to prolong the war.
